name: tooltip
title: Tooltip
description: Contextual hint on hover or focus, built on Radix with a self-wrapping provider.

props.name: delayDuration
props.description: On TooltipProvider; each Tooltip wraps its own provider so no app-level setup is needed.

notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths. Provider is baked into Tooltip (delayDuration 0) so consumers don't need app-level setup.
